name: @esmap-examples/enterprise-platform
description: Production-grade multi-package MFE demo: shared deps, import map server, ReadyGate auth, nested Parcels, keepAlive, compat migration

scripts.build:apps: pnpm build:auth && pnpm build:dashboard && pnpm build:team-directory && pnpm build:activity-feed && pnpm build:task-board && pnpm build:notifications && pnpm build:legacy-settings
scripts.build: pnpm build:shared-deps && pnpm build:design-system && pnpm build:apps
scripts.dev:clean-ports: for port in 3100 3101 3102 3103 3104 3105 3106 3107 3200; do lsof -ti :$port | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; sleep 1
scripts.dev: pnpm dev:clean-ports && pnpm build:shared-deps && pnpm build:design-system && pnpm seed:dev && concurrently -n server,host,auth,dash,team,feed,task,notif,legacy -c blue,green,yellow,cyan,magenta,red,white,gray,#ff8800 "pnpm run server" "pnpm dev:host" "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:dashboard" "pnpm dev:team-directory" "pnpm dev:activity-feed" "pnpm dev:task-board" "pnpm dev:notifications" "pnpm dev:legacy-settings"
scripts.dev:build: pnpm build && pnpm seed && concurrently "pnpm run server" "pnpm dev:host"
scripts.test: echo 'no unit tests — this is an integration demo'
